title: Bitter Crisp Croatian Vanilla Bean Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving Croatian dish featuring bitter flavors and whole30-friendly elements with the addition of vanilla extract for a unique twist.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add vanilla beans and scrape out seeds, add them along with the chopped garlic and onions. Saute for about 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Add bitter greens and bell peppers/zucchini to the pan. Stir-fry until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Fold in the remaining ingredients like arugula or radicchio towards the end of cooking time, allowing them to wilt slightly without getting mushy.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot as a snack or light meal.
